title: Havant Academy (Hampshire): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Havant Academy  URN: 136156  Notice issued to: The Kemnal Academies Trust  Reason for issue: ‘special measures’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Dame Kate Dethtridge  DfE regional director office: South East  Local authority: Hampshire County Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
